- [ ] Generated files or imports
- [ ] CLI output or prompts

1. Run `...`
2. Use options `...`
3. Observe `...`

Describe what should happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happens.

Paste the most relevant command output.

Paste stdout, stderr, or stack traces here.
